{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord revelation
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s [[Underlord revelation]] was that she practiced the [[sacred arts]] so she wouldn't be alone.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelsa]] is seeking her [[Underlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
